chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT LARKANA C.P.No.S-303 of 2025 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE 1. For orders on office objections at flag "A". 2. For orders on M.A.No. 686/2025 (E/A). 3. For hearing of main case. ------ 19.09.2025 Mr. Faiz Muhammad Larik, Advocate for the Petitioners. ------ Learned counsel for the petitioners under the instructions does not wish to press this petition, which is accordingly dismissed as not pressed alongwith the listed application. Judge Manzoor
